summary.title: Clinical Documentation AI Assistant
summary.primaryContact: Dr. Anya Mehta, Chief Medical Information Officer
summary.submissionFormat: Helix vendor portal upload (PDF + completed compliance matrix)
summary.overview: Helix Health is deploying an AI clinical documentation assistant across 14 hospitals and 220 outpatient clinics. The system must integrate with Epic EHR, support 38 specialty templates, and meet HIPAA and HITECH requirements. Vendor must provide a Business Associate Agreement.

strengths: AI workflow automation core capability transfers
Optum case study touches healthcare claims
weaknesses: No HITRUST CSF certification — material gap
Optum is claims, not clinical; no direct EHR/Epic deployment reference
No BAA template currently on file
Clinical accuracy validation methodology does not exist as a formal artifact

compliance.requirement: Vendor must provide signed Business Associate Agreement on Helix template.
compliance.note: No BAA on file. Legal review needed.

compliance.requirement: HITRUST CSF certification, current within 12 months.
compliance.note: Not currently HITRUST certified. Remediation timeline ~6 months.

compliance.requirement: Three healthcare customer references with EHR integration experience.
Integrate with Epic EHR via FHIR R4 APIs.
Clinical accuracy validation methodology with measurable thresholds.
Encryption at rest and in transit, key management with HSM.
Pricing schedule with per-physician and per-encounter tiers.

evidence.snippet: Per-seat tier exists; per-encounter to be derived

items: Stand up legal review of Helix BAA template.
Decide whether to commit to HITRUST CSF certification roadmap (6-month estimate).
Identify two healthcare references with Epic/EHR experience. None on file today.
Draft a clinical accuracy validation methodology including specialty-specific accuracy targets.
Confirm Epic FHIR integration scope (read-only vs. write).

draft.body: Helix Health's clinical documentation burden is a systemic driver of physician burnout and revenue leakage. Lyra AI proposes a clinical documentation assistant that integrates directly with Epic, drafts visit notes during the encounter, and routes coding recommendations to revenue cycle. [HEALTHCARE NARRATIVE — needs healthcare-specific framing from Maya].
placeholders: HEALTHCARE NARRATIVE — needs healthcare-specific framing from Maya

draft.body: Lyra maintains SOC 2 Type II controls and AES-256 encryption with HSM-backed key management. [HITRUST CSF status — missing; recommend partner attestation or commit to remediation roadmap]. [BAA — pending legal].
